package sample

import (
	"os"
	"sync"
)

type Rows interface {
	Close() error
}

type Stmt interface {
	Close() error
}

type Tx interface {
	Commit() error
	Rollback() error
}

type DB interface {
	Query(string) (Rows, error)
	Prepare(string) (Stmt, error)
	Begin() (Tx, error)
}

func Load(db DB) error {
	file, err := os.Open("input.txt")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer file.Close()

	rows, err := db.Query("select 1")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer rows.Close()

	stmt, err := db.Prepare("select 1")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer stmt.Close()

	tx, err := db.Begin()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer tx.Rollback()
	return tx.Commit()
}

func WaitAsync(items []string) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	for _, item := range items {
		wg.Add(1)
		go func(name string) {
			defer wg.Done()
			_ = name
		}(item)
	}
	wg.Wait()
}
